name: spawn_compute_requester_subagent
description: Spawn a sub-agent in its own Deno process. The sub-agent enrolls a fresh ATProto identity via Welcome Mat, writes a com.fedproxy.rbac record granting root CRUD on its own account, then writes a com.publicdomainrelay.temp.compute.vm and the wrapping com.publicdomainrelay.temp.market.rfp from that account. Returns { did, handle, rbacUri, vmUri, rfpUri }. The parent must record the sub-agent in its own history as network.comind.agent.profile.

handle.description: Handle to claim on the new account

accept_uri.description: Optional at:// URI of the accept record. Used as the actx seed for the workload identity binding so RBAC sub matches the OIDC token sub the dispatcher will issue.
